# Vendored: nlohmann/json

| Field | Value |
|-|-|
| Project | nlohmann/json (https://github.com/nlohmann/json) |
| Version | v3.12.0 |
| Commit | 55f93686c01528224f448c19128836e7df245f72 (tag `v3.12.0`) |
| License | MIT (see `LICENSE.MIT`, retained verbatim) |
| Vendored | 2026-06-10 |

## What is vendored

The single-header distribution (`single_include/nlohmann/json.hpp`) as `json.hpp`.
Header-only; included as `<nlohmann/json.hpp>` with `third_party/` on the include
path. Vendoring (rather than a configure-time download) keeps this repository
self-contained and offline-buildable.

## Local modifications

NONE. The header is byte-identical to the upstream tag.
